caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering, and a gold necklace sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a microphone on a boom arm, with headphones over his cap. In the background, a white wall features repeated logos that say "UNICORN HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him is a black mug with "THE BOSS TALK OUT LOUD" printed on it. As the scene progresses, the man remains seated, looking slightly to his left while gesturing with his hands and adjusting his position. His facial expression remains relatively consistent, showing him in mid-conversation. The camera angle is a medium close-up, remaining static throughout the sequence.
